hero.subtitle: Learn from applied experiences, share solutions, and connect with peers tackling the same challenges in their territories

inspiration.title: Inspiration & Learning
inspiration.intro: We are part of a community affected by climate change, with a certain degree of technical knowledge

problemSpace.title: Our problem space
problemSpace.description: Climate change impacts our territories in multiple ways. To better understand them, we consider three key dimensions

sectors.title: Economic sectors
sectors.description: Currently, the platform focuses on three economic sectors where these impacts are most visible. In the future, new economic sectors will be added as climate impacts spread and adaptation needs evolve

cards.title: Agriculture
cards.description: Droughts, soil degradation, pests, water scarcity

whyMatters.title: Why this matters?
whyMatters.intro: The internet is full of papers, platforms and reports, but practitioners need practical access to

items.text: Technologies and practices tested in real contexts
Organizational and governance models that work
People and networks to connect with

steps.title: To Understand
steps.body: I explore useful knowledge to understand challenges better and identify possible solutions.
steps.imageAlt: Diagram showing useful knowledge and inspiration around the HUB

steps.title: To Discover
steps.body: I find what others have already done, connect with them, and access resources like funding or training.
steps.imageAlt: Diagram showing connecting knowledge across sectors

steps.title: To Get inspired
steps.body: I transform knowledge, adapt it to my context, and create my own network of resources.
steps.imageAlt: Diagram showing creating own resources from inspiration

recipe.title: The Recipe
recipe.intro: Each recipe distills a real case of climate adaptation—problem, context, actors, and solutions—into a practical format to inspire, compare, and adapt
recipe.imageAlt: Screenshot of a recipe page in the platform
